headline: Standard Motor Products Releases 505 New Numbers in First Quarter
summary: Standard Motor Products, Inc. (SMP) is pleased to announce that it released more than 500 new part numbers in Q1 of 2026. This includes new applications from SMP's Vehicle Control and Temperature Control divisions for late-model import and domestic vehicles.

headline: Is General Motors (GM) One of the Best Car Stocks to Buy in 2026?

headline: GM first quarter sales slump 9.7% on "exceptionally high" comparison

headline: GM Sales Fall Nearly 10% as the Auto Industry Sputters
summary: General Motors’  sales plunged in the first quarter of the year, falling 9.7%, in its biggest drop in almost four years, as high interest rates and vehicle prices across the industry held buyers back even before the impact of rising gas prices is fully felt.  “Abnormal is now normal,” GM North American chief  Duncan Aldred  said, speaking at an event ahead of the New York Auto Show.  Analysts have been expecting auto sales to be flat or down for 2026, citing still-high interest rates, the end of electric-vehicle tax credits and broader economic uncertainty.

Analysts have been expecting auto sales to be flat or down for 2026, citing still-high interest rates, the end of electric-vehicle tax credits and broader economic uncertainty.

headline: General Motors blames weather, more for 9.7% first quarter sales dip
summary: GM said sales suffered from a harsh comparison to last year, where the industry saw landmark sales numbers ahead of a series of regulatory changes.

headline: GM to boost pickup truck production in Michigan amid strong demand
summary: GM plans to run its Flint Assembly plant six days a week starting in June, mandating overtime for 4,200 workers to boost heavy-duty Silverado and Sierra output.

raw.headline: GM to boost pickup truck production in Michigan amid strong demand
raw.summary: GM plans to run its Flint Assembly plant six days a week starting in June, mandating overtime for 4,200 workers to boost heavy-duty Silverado and Sierra output.

headline: Unifor calls for 'Sell Here, Build Here,' mandates on anniversary of Trump auto tariffs
summary: As Canadian workers mark one year of economic disruption and job losses triggered by U.S. tariffs targeting Canada's auto industry and other key sectors, Unifor is escalating the union's clear demand to corporate and government decision-makers: "Sell Here. Build Here."

raw.headline: Unifor calls for 'Sell Here, Build Here,' mandates on anniversary of Trump auto tariffs

headline: A Look At General Motors (GM) Valuation As Pickup Production Rises And EV Output Slows
summary: General Motors (GM) is shifting its production mix, increasing output of Chevrolet Silverado and GMC Sierra heavy duty pickups at its Flint Assembly plant while extending downtime and temporary layoffs at its Factory ZERO electric vehicle facility. See our latest analysis for General Motors. GM’s latest production shift comes as the 1-day share price return of 2.39% contrasts with weaker recent momentum, including a 30-day share price return of 5.35% and year to date return of 8.00%, while...

headline: Allison Transmission (ALSN) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of transmission provider Allison Transmission (NYSE:ALSN) jumped 3.3% in the afternoon session after reports revealed that a major automaker, General Motors, planned to increase production of heavy-duty trucks to meet strong demand.

headline: America Now Has an EV Rust Belt. High Gas Prices Won’t Rescue It.
summary: GM supplier Magna is stuck with a plant built to churn out parts for battery-powered pickups. “The magnitude of uncertainty is unparalleled,” said its CEO.
